# shortDescription

**Instance Property**

A short text description of the model.

## Declaration

```swift
var shortDescription: String
```

## Accessing metadata

- **author**: The author of the model.
- **license**: The license governing the use of the model.
- **version**: The model version.
- **additional**: A dictionary that encodes key value pairs to hold additional information about the model.

items.description: The license governing the use of the model.
items.name: license
